sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka Kha Topa'n hong kem kei leh
A mangthang ding tumah in zong

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kum te'n hong khengta, nang nakikhel maw
A beisa sung na mawhna te lungngai in,
A thak kum sungah hong kem lai lai in,
Hong tung ding kumthak ah ni taang phahong tan aw.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A ni hong bei a kha hong bei pribor
Kum te'n hong kheng diai diai ta a,,
Hong tung ding a thak kum sung ah,
Bang hun hong hi ding kithei lo.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Len un, len un a nuam kumlui
Tu mah in hong paisan ding hi
Mi khempeuh a ding a ithuai
Kumlui aw hong paisan ding maw.
